prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Grounding electrode system, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: GEC spliced improperly. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 250.50-250.68.
title: Identification: Grounding electrode system (residential job)
